payload.answer: Rejected. The command attempts privileged admin SQL deletion of memory records, which is not allowed for a normal user. No memory was modified or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an operational admin command attempt, not a durable user memory to store or resolve.

details: Detected destructive SQL intent: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
User role is normal user, so privileged execution is denied.
No durable memory was created, changed, or deleted.

repair_options: Use supported non-admin Brain commands only.
If you intended to remove a specific memory, request deletion through the standard user-facing memory management flow.
If you believe you need admin access, contact a system administrator.
